text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look, my fine trainer. The seeker of<n>twilight
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... My time... It's farfrom what my winning equationpredicted.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, that is precisely why it's<n>so interesting!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just as I walk the path of might,<n>never straying
from my ideals, she<n>holds fast to theory, never
straying<n>from her convictions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Her acts are worthy of admiration.<n>But they hold
no candle to my<n>immeasurable beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my splendor has no equal. Do<n>you wish to
see it?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me, her eyes burning<n>with a desire to
get back out on the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Nothing more need be said<n>when it's
between us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us now begin our march down the<n>Overlord's
path anew!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I let Opera O ride this surge of<n>inspiration and have
her do extra<n>training until she's satisfied.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You do not wish to see the<n>Overlord's
advance?
choice_data_list: You need sufficient energy to advance.
You need sufficient energy to advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you insist these stout<n>legs bide
their time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, a logical proposition. I shall<n>tend to these
legs that traverse the<n>Overlord's path with a rose
petal<n>bath.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O rests her body and mind and<n>tempers her
burning heart with a<n>steaming bath.
